Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name.
  • db_home - (Required) Database home configuration.
    • database - (Required) Database details.
      • admin_password - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
      • db_workload - (Optional) Changing this value forces a new resource.
      • license_model - (Optional) This field may be updated in place, or may require replacement depending on the workload.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) Defined tags for this resource.
